description: Our bindings.rs uses #[link(name="fuse3")] which now resolves to macFUSE's libfuse3.4.dylib. Verify the symbols match (fuse_new_31, fuse_mount, fuse_loop_mt_31, fuse_get_context, fuse_destroy). The headers in /usr/local/include/fuse3 still symlink to FUSE-T — may need to update or not use them (we have hand-written bindings). Update nix/packages/turnkey-composed.nix LIBRARY_PATH to find macFUSE lib. Test that the binary links correctly.
title: Link against macFUSE libfuse3 instead of FUSE-T
